components.text: 7 Days Left — Old Price Closing 18th May

Hi {{1}}, this is TBWX 🧇

You'd enquired with us earlier about our franchise — wanted to reach out before our pricing changes.

*Our old price of ₹1.5 Lakhs + GST is closing on 18th May.* After that, it moves to our new standard slab (₹4–7 Lakhs).

If you were on the fence earlier, this is the moment to revisit:

✅ Most franchise-friendly model in India
✅ 100+ sqft, 2–4 staff
✅ 8–12 month ROI
✅ 40+ outlets already operational
✅ Full setup, training & supply chain handled by us

7 days left to lock the old price. Reply YES and our team will share the agreement today.
